memberdef.argsstring: (int nu, form_factor_f f, double *x, size_t len_x, void *f_ctx, double *output, const char *strategy_name, strategy_params strategy_params)
memberdef.name: hankel_transform

briefdescription.para: Computes Hankel transform using the method specified by the user.

simplesect.para: The parameter strategy_name can be any of "QWE_Chave", "QWE_Key", "DHT_6", "DHT_7", "DHT_8", "DHT_9", "DHT_10", "DHT_11".

parameterdescription.para: order of bessel function - must be 0 or 1
pointer to array of x at which to compute the transform
pointer to struct containing inputs for f
pointer to array containing output from transform
str corresponding to the strategy name
struct containing params for the specific strategy (please use the docs to find params required by each strategy)
